# Pangolin Stack Wiki

> LLM-oriented manifest for the homelab wiki in this repo.

This wiki is the authoritative knowledge base for the Pangolin stack and its
related homelab services as documented in `/home/jesus/pangolin-stack`.

## How to Use This Wiki

- Read `AGENTS.md` first for repo-level operational rules.
- Then read `docs/wiki/README.md` for coverage and page map.
- Then read `docs/wiki/system-overview.md` for topology and critical rules.
- Then read the relevant dated review and the relevant service page before
  making claims or edits.
- Cite wiki paths directly in answers.

## Key Entry Points

- [README](./README.md): index and current coverage boundaries
- [System Overview](./system-overview.md): architecture, startup order, critical
  operational rules
- [Maintenance Workflow](./maintenance-workflow.md): answer, edit, and lint
  workflow for agents
- [Index](./index.md): flat content catalog for fast navigation
- [Glossary](./glossary.md): compact definitions for recurring terms
- [LLM Wiki Pattern](./llm-wiki-pattern.md): adopted external best practices
- [Wiki Log](./log.md): append-only structural maintenance log
- [Compose Review 2026-04-17](./compose-review-2026-04-17.md): latest VPS audit
- [NASUS Review 2026-04-17](./nasus-review-2026-04-17.md): latest NASUS audit

- [plex](./services-nasus/plex.md)
- [seerr](./services-nasus/seerr.md)
- [dashdot (NASUS)](./services-nasus/dashdot.md)

## Critical Rules

- Pangolin, Gerbil, Newt, Olm, Badger, and CrowdSec Web UI stay pinned.
- If Gerbil is recreated, Traefik must be recreated too.
- Pocket-ID shared-data bug remains unfixed until the service page says
  otherwise.
- NASUS `NC1` and `NC2` are still open compromise-risk surfaces.
- NASUS compose changes flow **live host -> repo**, not repo -> live host.
- When touching NASUS, update the live file, `host-configs/nasus/<service>/docker-compose.yml`, and the matching `services-nasus` page together.

## Preferred Editing Behavior

- Use existing findings and remediation snippets when available.
- If a requested change is not covered, research upstream and add a traceable
  finding before editing compose.
- Keep dated review files append-only.
- Update machine entry points when the wiki structure changes.
- For NASUS, read `docs/wiki/nasus-review-2026-04-17.md` and the matching
  `docs/wiki/services-nasus/<service>.md` before editing.
